meaning: adj.病的,由病引起的,病态的,恐怖的
examples: Jane has a morbid interest in horror films.
"How I look forward," this becomes almost morbid.
The Morbid Anatomy Museum is open Wednesday to Monday, 12 pm to 6 pm.
Down the other, slightly less-morbid, path: a Lord of the Rings-style fantasy world with monsters and hobbits.
